title: stelis pachyrrhiza
intro: Stelis pachyrrhiza, also known as the "Long-nosed Stelis," is a type of orchid plant native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis pachyrrhiza include relief from coughs, colds, and stomach cramps, as well as reduced inflammation and improved digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
